title: Israel’s Missile Defense Under Scrutiny After Iranian Attack
summary_full: Two missiles landed hours apart, wreaking havoc in two towns near a heavily guarded nuclear site in the Negev Desert.
summary_public: Two missiles landed hours apart, wreaking havoc in two towns near a heavily guarded nuclear site in the Negev Desert.
